nasb.text: So then, some were shouting one thing and some another, for the assembly was in confusion and the majority did not know for what reason they had come together.

esv.text: Now some cried out one thing, some another, for the assembly was in confusion, and most of them did not know why they had come together.

cnv.text: 那時大家叫這個喊那個，亂成一團，大多數的人都不知道聚集的原因。

ccb.text: 这时，戏院里面的人都在大喊大叫，混乱不堪。其实大部分人根本不知道自己为什么聚在那里。

csbs.text: 这时候，有人喊这个、有人喊那个，因为集会的人一片混乱，大多数人不知道为了什么缘故聚集。
